repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #78105 by updating the dirty branch against current main while preserving the scoped plugin allowlist warning UX change and source contributor credit.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(plugins): make empty allowlist warning actionable
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs contributor PR #78105 against current main.
- Keeps the warning remediation scoped to paste-ready plugins.allow guidance and plugin id discovery docs.
- Preserves attribution for @pahuchi-joe as the source PR contributor.

## Source credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/78105
Contributor: @pahuchi-joe

## Validation
- pnpm test src/plugins/loader.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- /review
credit_notes: Credit contributor @pahuchi-joe in the repaired PR body and changelog attribution if the user-facing warning text remains derived from the source PR.
